name: The Space That Makes Us Human
original_name: The Space That Makes Us Human
overview: The Space That Makes Us Human is a documentary film experience inspired by the mission, vision and voices of The Karman Project that showcases the profound potential of space in bringing us closer to our dreams, to our capabilities, our responsibilities and ultimately to each other. Our desire is to remind everybody—from space leaders to the enthusiasts of a new generation - that space is fundamental to the human experience, and achieving true global cooperation can position space as an equaliser for humanity.

trailers.title: A new space travel film series | official trailer
